overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit district of Night City. The player character walks under elevated highways, crosses intersections, explores narrow alleys with food stalls, and passes through dark corridors, showcasing the game's atmospheric ray-traced lighting and dense urban cyberpunk environment.

events.description: passing the illuminated Allen street sign
turning left to cross the street at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, approaching the intersection

notable_agents.action: person with yellow umbrella crossing the street ahead

entered.detail: elevated concrete highway structure spanning the street above
illuminated street sign reading 'Allen' mounted on a black pole
large holographic billboard displaying pink neon imagery of a woman
metal and concrete safety barrier along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a rain-soaked street beneath an elevated highway. The camera passes the illuminated 'Allen' street sign and approaches an intersection, with neon billboards visible in the distance and concrete barriers lining the path. The atmosphere is moody and cyberpunk, with wet asphalt reflecting the green street lights.

events.description: turning left into narrower commercial street with dense signage

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and continuing along the street lined with holographic storefronts and neon signs

entered.detail: multi-story building covered with holographic advertisements and neon signage
storefront with bright red 'CHAOS' neon signage
trees with pink illuminated blossoms along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the scene transitions to a dense commercial street lined with holographic billboards and neon storefronts. The camera turns left, revealing a corner building covered in digital advertisements and pink-lit cherry trees along the sidewalk. The rain continues to fall, creating reflective surfaces on the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with outdoor food stalls and seating

events.description: entering narrow alley with food stalls and outdoor seating areas
passing pedestrians seated at plastic tables eating at food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alley, passing food stalls with red lanterns and people dining outdoors at plastic tables

notable_agents.action: person holding a glowing orange umbrella walking ahead in the alley

entered.detail: food stall with hanging red paper lanterns and green neon lighting
red and white plastic chairs and tables scattered on the pavement
tall vertical neon signs with Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: The scene narrows into an enclosed alleyway filled with food stalls adorned with red paper lanterns. Plastic chairs and tables occupy the center of the walkway where pedestrians sit and eat. The camera passes a person with a glowing orange umbrella while navigating through the crowded, neon-lit passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway and dark utility corridor

events.description: ascending metal stairs with red railings to upper level
entering dark corridor illuminated by green emergency lighting

agents.ego_description: climbing metal stairs and walking through a dark corridor with green lighting, passing a body on the ground

notable_agents.action: person lying motionless on the ground in the dark corridor

entered.detail: metal staircase with red painted railings leading upward to covered walkway
narrow corridor illuminated by single green emergency light
red illuminated vending machine with product advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a metal staircase with red railings into a covered walkway, then enters a dark corridor lit by an eerie green emergency light. A body lies on the ground near the corridor exit. The environment shifts from the vibrant neon of the alley to a darker, more ominous atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with vending machines and modern buildings

events.description: passing close by a large NPC in dark clothing and hat

agents.ego_description: exiting the corridor and walking along the street past vending machines and a large pedestrian

notable_agents.action: large man in dark clothing and hat walking toward the camera

entered.detail: green illuminated vending machine with product displays
modern high-rise building with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dark corridor, the scene returns to street level with vending machines lining the path. The camera passes a large NPC in dark clothing and continues along the wet sidewalk. A tall modern glass building rises in the background, completing the urban cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked urban district, transitioning from open neon-lit streets into a claustrophobic alleyway before ending in a stark, modern cityscape. It begins beneath an elevated highway, moving past an illuminated street sign and concrete barriers where wet asphalt reflects green lights. As the camera crosses an intersection, the environment opens into a commercial street filled with holographic billboards and pink-lit cherry trees before turning left into a narrow alleyway crowded with red paper lanterns and food stalls. The scene then shifts in tone as the camera ascends a metal staircase and enters a dark corridor lit by an eerie green emergency light, passing a body on the ground. Finally, the camera exits the gloom to return to street level, passing vending machines and a large figure in dark clothing while a towering glass building rises in the background.
